scripts.build: pnpm --filter @prediction-chess/shared build && pnpm --filter @prediction-chess/web build && pnpm --filter @prediction-chess/worker build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @prediction-chess/shared lint && pnpm --filter @prediction-chess/web lint && pnpm --filter @prediction-chess/worker lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @prediction-chess/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @prediction-chess/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @prediction-chess/worker typecheck
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter @prediction-chess/shared clean && pnpm --filter @prediction-chess/web clean && pnpm --filter @prediction-chess/worker clean
